function.name: ETRX_ORG_TREE
function.body:
BEGIN IF type = -1 THEN -- lógica para tipo -1 (padres) RETURN QUERY (SELECT ad_parent_org_id FROM ad_org_tree WHERE ad_org_id=org_id);
ELSIF type = 0 THEN -- lógica para tipo 0 (hijas y padres) RETURN QUERY WITH RECURSIVE org_tree(ad_org_id, ad_parent_org_id) AS ( SELECT ad_org_id, ad_parent_org_id FROM ad_org_tree WHERE ad_parent_org_id = org_id UNION ALL SELECT a.ad_org_id, a.ad_parent_org_id FROM ad_org_tree a JOIN org_tree b ON a.ad_parent_org_id = b.ad_parent_org_id WHERE a.ad_parent_org_id <> org_id ) SELECT ad_org_id::VARCHAR FROM org_tree WHERE ad_org_id <> org_id UNION ALL SELECT ad_parent_org_id FROM ad_org_tree WHERE ad_org_id=org_id; ELSIF type = 1 THEN -- lógica para tipo 1 (hijas) RETURN QUERY WITH RECURSIVE org_tree(ad_org_id, ad_parent_org_id) AS ( SELECT ad_org_id, ad_parent_org_id FROM ad_org_tree WHERE ad_parent_org_id = org_id UNION ALL SELECT a.ad_org_id, a.ad_parent_org_id FROM ad_org_tree a JOIN org_tree b ON a.ad_parent_org_id = b.ad_parent_org_id WHERE a.ad_parent_org_id <> org_id ) SELECT ad_org_id::VARCHAR FROM org_tree WHERE ad_org_id <> org_id ORDER BY ad_org_id; END IF; END ETRX_ORG_TREE
